title: Optimize TF-IDF Index

tasks.description: Implement lazy-loading for TF-IDF index - Build index only on first ranked search, cache and reuse, rebuild only when entity count changes
acceptanceCriteria: Index built on first ranked search only
Rebuild only when entity count changes

tasks.description: Implement incremental TF-IDF updates - Add addEntity() and removeEntity() methods for O(1) index updates instead of full rebuild
acceptanceCriteria: No full rebuild on single entity changes

tasks.description: Integrate TF-IDF with GraphStorage events - Call addEntity/removeEntity on mutations, invalidate on cache clear
Optimize TF-IDF memory usage - Use numeric term IDs instead of strings, use Uint16Array for small counts, implement vocabulary pruning (remove terms in < 2 docs)
Add TF-IDF performance tests - Create tests for index build time (< 100ms for 1000 entities), incremental update time (< 1ms), search time (< 10ms), memory usage (< 10MB for 10000 entities)
testCases: should build index in < 100ms for 1000 entities

notes: This sprint optimizes the TF-IDF index used for ranked search. Currently the index is built eagerly and fully rebuilt on changes. After this sprint, the index is lazy-loaded and updated incrementally.
